Level 8.1{{Underline|4055ff}}"Symmetrical Cave"
{{RecommendedAudioNest|bg-color=var(--theme-page-background-color--secondary)|border=2px solid var(--theme-border-color)|text-color=var(--theme-text-color)|audio={{Audio|file=Third Theme - PRESSURE GAME OST -.mp3|loop=true|volume=0.95|align=center|=true|secrettext=Pressure Reference. [[Level 8.1]], named as ''"Symmetrical Cave,"'' is the 1st sublevel of [[Level 8]].
{{Underline|302244}}
== Description == {{Simple Image Block|image=Level 8.1 sc.png|width=280px|style=Border: 6px double var(--theme-border-color);background: var(--theme-page-background-color--secondary)|caption=The popular image of this sublevel. The picture depicted a dark corridor brightened up with a strong flashlight. The photographer is presumed to be a member of [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]]}} {{Simple Image Block|image=Level 8.1 noai 2.png|width=280px|style=border: 6px double var(--theme-border-color);background: var(--theme-page-background-color--secondary)|caption=Another known image of [[Level 8.1]]. The origin and photographer of this particular picture still remain unclear to this day, as there are multiple distant people claiming as the photographer.}} [[Level 8.1]] is an expansive, and cave-like system, which appears to have somewhat smooth stone surfaces and walls that follow oddly symmetrical, and almost geometric patterns. These patterns are not naturally occurring and seem to suggest artificial shaping, though no known tools or markings reveal how they were formed. The entire cave is shaded in a silvery-blue hue. Soft luminescence throughout the environment originates from crystalline structures known as ''"Tiniund Crystals"''. These crystals are the main source of light within [[Level 8.1]] and exhibit a pale glow that seems to change in intensity based on proximity to movement or sound. '''Tiniund Crystals''' are not biologically active, but they appear semi-aware of their surroundings; usually grow in clusters near frequented paths or water sources. What makes '''Tiniund Crystals''' different from any other known [[Backrooms Wiki|Backrooms]] mineral is their complex internal lattice, which enables the controlled storage and release of electrical energy. When refined properly, those can power simple machinery or be modified into highly reactive energy sources, which makes them invaluable for crafting both defensive/offensive tools and advanced weaponry. However, the crystals are delicate when disturbed; sudden impact or overexposure to heat can cause a volatile discharge. Freshwater pools and slow-running streams are found throughout the level, which usually form at the bases of the crystal clusters. In narrower corridors and constricted chambers, explorers frequently discover useful items: from repair tools to bags full of unnaturally pristine rations and other miscellaneous foods, that are tucked away in recesses. Whether these objects appear naturally or are remnants of former travelers is unknown. === Land Of Blockiness === [[Level 8.1]] contains a rare sub-region known as the ''"Land Of Blockiness",'' distinguishable by its sudden change in geometry and texture. In stark contrast to the smooth, and fluid curvature of the main caverns, this area is composed entirely of block-like formations: cubes and rectangles that combined with precision. The surfaces lack the organic polish of the surrounding level and instead feel brittle. Despite its strange, and geometric appearance, these blocks fracture easily under pressure, and crumble into fine mineral dust when struck with sufficient force. The structural instability of the '''Land Of Blockiness''' makes traversal dangerous, as walls and floors may collapse without warning. '''Tiniund Crystals''' are rarely found here, and when they do appear, they are dulled, malformed, and non-reactive, which seem to be "corrupted" by the environment. This variant/area is theorised to be either a decaying or improperly generated extension of [[Level 8.1]], where the rules of structure and solidity begin to fracture. The purpose or origin of this angular anomaly is unknown, but many who enter report a sense of dissonance, as though the level itself is struggling to maintain cohesion in this space.
{{Underline|302244}}
== Entities == Entities within [[Level 8.1]] are relatively scarce, but the perpetual low light and the terrain make the presence of even a few threats significantly more dangerous. The darkness, broken only by the glow of '''Tiniund Crystals''', creates long shadows and obscure corners where hostile entities may dwell unnoticed. [[Entity 3|Smilers]] are extremely rare in [[Level 8.1]], but the ambient darkness makes spotting their presence especially difficult until it is too late. They tend to linger in crystal-deprived tunnels, taking advantage of explorers who wander too far from light sources. [[Entity 16|Undying]] can occasionally be encountered in the deeper, and more isolated cave areas. These encounters are exceptionally dangerous and should be avoided at all costs. [[Entity 5|Clumps]] appear uncommonly throughout [[Level 8.1]], usually camouflaging themselves against the patterned walls or partially hiding in water pools. Their presence is unpredictable, and they tend to be motionless until provoked. [[Entity 46|Narco Jellyfish]] are uncommon, but can be found in deep pools of water, particularly in darker crystals-deprived areas. Interestingly, the '''Land of Blockiness''' seems to be devoid of most entities, which is potentially due to its unstable terrain and mineral composition. Individuals have reported that even aggressive entities hesitate to enter, which suggests some form of environmental deterrent or disruption.
{{Underline|302244}}
== Communities, Bases, & Outposts == === [[A.D.F.]] Major Facility === The '''[[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] Major Facility''' is the central headquarters and most advanced establishment of the [[Another Dimension Foundation]], which is built deep within [[Level 8.1]]. Designed to merge with the level’s unique topology, the facility harnesses the natural properties of the environment; particularly the reactive '''Tiniund Crystals''', to power a semi-automatic infrastructure. Reinforced with synthetic alloys and layered into the native stone, the facility acts as a hub for research, containment, exploration, and interdimensional operations. Despite [[Level 8.1]]’s darkness and occasional threats, the facility thrives through constant surveillance, adaptive architecture, and crystal-powered security systems. Divided into highly specialized sectors, the '''[[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] Major Facility''' represents a combination of scientific innovation, strategic command, and anomaly stewardship, and stands as one of the most fortified and technologically integrated strongholds in the [[Backrooms Wiki|Backrooms]].
{{Underline|302244}}
== Entrances & Exits == ===Entrances === * Entering a rare industrial tunnel in [[Level 8]] may gradually transitions into [[Level 8.1]]. * Diving into a pond in [[Level 8]] may result in finding an entrance to [[Level 8.1]]. * No-Clipping into a rare, and smooth stone wall also in [[Level 8]] will direct one to [[Level 8.1]]. === Exits === * Following a descending path for several kilometers may lead to a ruty gate. Opening it will lead back to a dark path in [[Level 8]] or the entry point of [[Level 8.5]]. * In the '''Land of Blockiness''', breaking through fragile floor blocks may drop one into [[Level 8]]. * Finding and going to the end from a yellow stoned hallway lead to [[Level 8.2]]. * Exploring through a strangely pulsating area, will transition the current sublevel to [[Level 8.4]]. * A narrow opening to [[Level 9]] or [[Level 10]] can be found if one wandered enough. * Climbing up a rare ladder, leads to [[Level 11]] or, much more rarely, to one of its sublevels.
